name: Space-Age-Hardcore-Mode
title: ​Space Age: Hardcore Mode
author: thesixthroc
description:
Space Age: Hardcore Mode is a tastefully designed collection of tweaks & mods that tighten the gameplay of Space Age by removing shortcuts and adding interesting challenge. Not a gratuitous difficulty mod.

Special technologies are required to drop cargo on Tier 2 planets. Each such planet has incentive to build a small on-planet science chain.

Optional dependencies are further Vanilla+ content mods that work well together.
